safety_use_cases.label: PPE safety glove compliance monitoring
safety_use_cases.description: Enable and review safety glove detection across sites to monitor PPE compliance and gather feedback on alerts.

evidence.quote: Hey, the last thing I'll just mention is we got safety gloves turned on for you guys across the board this last week.
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: So feel free to take a look and sort of let us know if have any feedback before we jump back on a week from today.
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>
